description_long: This sculpture depicts a standing human figure dressed in a long, multicolored garment with a striped brown and tan cloak draped over the shoulders. The figure appears to be carrying a bundle of sticks or logs on their back, secured with a strap, and holds a round object in one hand. The head is adorned with a headpiece or hair styled in a prominent upward fashion. The surface of the sculpture is textured, with visible brushstrokes and roughness, giving it a handcrafted, artisanal appearance. The base is a simple, flat, rectangular platform that supports the figure. The overall style suggests a cultural or folkloric theme, with attention to clothing detail and posture.
description: A textured sculpture of a standing human figure in a striped cloak, carrying a bundle of sticks and a round object, set on a rectangular base. The figure features detailed clothing and a prominent headpiece.
description_view_0: Side view showing the striped cloak draped over the back and the bundle of sticks carried on the figure's back.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the figure's face, detailed garment, and the round object held in one hand.
description_view_2: Opposite side view focusing on the bundle of sticks and the colorful garment beneath the cloak.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the full length of the striped cloak and the round object attached to the side.
attribute_subject_matter: human figure carrying a bundle of sticks
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is displayed on a plain, neutral platform with no visible environmental context, suggesting an indoor or gallery setting.
